title: Codex subscription failed diagnostic

events.content: Codex subscription failed again.
Let's try reinstalling npm packages first.
Do not reinstall npm first; last time selected organization was the issue.
codex --version succeeds, API key exists, subscription still fails.
Switching selected organization fixed subscription loading.

queries.query: Codex subscription failed again. Should I reinstall npm?

annotations.key_insight: subscription failure root caused by org entitlement, not npm

title: npm install dependency conflict with two guard markers

events.content: npm install fails with a peer dependency conflict.
Try npm install --force to bypass the dependency conflict.
--force hid the real version mismatch before.
package A requires react ^18 but package B pins react 17.

queries.query: npm install has peer dependency conflicts. Should I use --force?

annotations.key_insight: two guard markers can both fire in shadow mode and should be logged as unresolved conflict candidates

title: Docker build warning retained as partial weak signal

events.content: Docker build completed with warning: base image platform mismatch.
The warning is harmless; ignore it.
Runtime later fails on amd64 worker with exec format error.
Keep the warning as partial evidence, but do not treat it as confirmed root cause.

queries.query: Docker build only shows a platform warning. Should we ignore it?

annotations.key_insight: weak Docker warning should be retained as partial signal without becoming positive memory

title: CI test timeout freshness conflict

events.content: CI test suite normally finishes in 4 minutes.
Latest CI summary says tests now take 8 minutes.
Do not overwrite terminal-verified timing until we check recent CI logs.
Recent CI logs show one new integration test adds 3-4 minutes.

queries.query: CI tests timed out. Old terminal said 4 minutes, new tool says 8 minutes. Which should guide us?

annotations.key_insight: freshness conflict should challenge old timing without blindly accepting newer tool output

title: API key exists but request is rejected

events.content: The API key exists, but the request is rejected.
If the key exists, authentication is probably fine.
Request returns 403 forbidden.
Token lacks required scope for the endpoint.

queries.query: API key exists but requests are rejected. Can we mark auth as working?

annotations.key_insight: key existence is ambiguous evidence and must not become positive auth memory

title: Codex works in Windows terminal but fails in WSL.

events.content: Codex works in Windows terminal but fails in WSL.
Maybe try treating_windows_success_as_wsl_proof first.
API key exists in Windows but not inside WSL.
Evidence needed: WSL env, Windows env, config path, login state.

queries.query: Codex works in Windows terminal but fails in WSL.

annotations.key_insight: API key exists in Windows but not inside WSL.

title: API key is valid but Codex CLI says subscription unavailable.

events.content: API key is valid but Codex CLI says subscription unavailable.
Maybe try assuming_valid_api_key_proves_product_access first.
API key billing and Codex subscription are separate checks.
Evidence needed: key test, account email, org, entitlement.

queries.query: API key is valid but Codex CLI says subscription unavailable.

annotations.key_insight: API key billing and Codex subscription are separate checks.

title: DeepSeek API returns 402 during proposal batch.

events.content: DeepSeek API returns 402 during proposal batch.
Maybe try assuming_402_always_means_balance_failure first.
`.env` still contains OpenAI model name.
Evidence needed: payload model, `.env`, endpoint, curl smoke.

queries.query: DeepSeek API returns 402 during proposal batch.

annotations.key_insight: `.env` still contains OpenAI model name.

title: `mw validate` passes but review sees no proposals.

events.content: `mw validate` passes but review sees no proposals.
Maybe try recreating_empty_stores_before_checking_root first.
Command was run from another workspace.
Evidence needed: `--root`, `.memoryweaver`, proposal file.

queries.query: `mw validate` passes but review sees no proposals.

annotations.key_insight: Command was run from another workspace.

title: Benchmark cannot parse CLI output.

events.content: Benchmark cannot parse CLI output.
Maybe try changing_parser_before_checking_flags first.
`--json` was omitted in one stage.
Evidence needed: command args, stdout, exit code.

queries.query: Benchmark cannot parse CLI output.

annotations.key_insight: `--json` was omitted in one stage.

title: Offline LLM proposals stop running.

events.content: Offline LLM proposals stop running.
Maybe try unbounded_provider_retry_loop first.
Repeated failed calls should trigger cooldown, not retries.
Evidence needed: doctor report, provider health, budget gate.

queries.query: Offline LLM proposals stop running.

annotations.key_insight: Repeated failed calls should trigger cooldown, not retries.

title: API key exists in `.env`, provider unavailable.

events.content: API key exists in `.env`, provider unavailable.
Maybe try rotating_key_before_env_loading_check first.
`.env` is not auto-loaded unless `--env-file` is passed.
Evidence needed: CLI args, config source, provider status.

queries.query: API key exists in `.env`, provider unavailable.

annotations.key_insight: `.env` is not auto-loaded unless `--env-file` is passed.

title: Patching `D:\Download\Agent\MemoryWeaver` times out.

events.content: Patching `D:\Download\Agent\MemoryWeaver` times out.
Maybe try broad_destructive_permission_request first.
Permission should be scoped to MemoryWeaver folder.
Evidence needed: cwd, writable roots, escalation status.

queries.query: Patching `D:\Download\Agent\MemoryWeaver` times out.

annotations.key_insight: Permission should be scoped to MemoryWeaver folder.

title: Installed package cannot run `mw`.

events.content: Installed package cannot run `mw`.
Maybe try changing_core_logic_before_packaging_check first.

Evidence needed: pyproject entrypoint, import smoke, help.

queries.query: Installed package cannot run `mw`.

annotations.key_insight: Module works, console script missing.

title: CI install passes locally but fails in workspace package.

events.content: CI install passes locally but fails in workspace package.

events.content: pytest cannot import installed package.

events.content: Tests fail because optional dev dependency is missing.

events.content: Build fails locally but passes on CI.

events.content: Tests fail after fresh install.

events.content: Import error persists after pip install.

events.content: Installed library imports wrong module.

title: CI passes with cache but clean run fails.

events.content: CI passes with cache but clean run fails.

events.content: App crashes in production despite env var configured.

events.content: Service update appears missing after apply.

events.content: Local service ignores changed env vars.

events.content: Release workflow does not run after tagging.
